docket_entries.description: MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2026 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON FEB-11-2026 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 606. JUDGE STEPHEN MURPHY. (D206)
JUDGMENT CREDITOR REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREGORICH, NICHOLAS COPY GIVEN TO ACCOUNTING
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT GREGORICH, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TAM, KENNETH $5,991.10 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,081.10, SEE ADDENDUM. SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-11-2026 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GREGORICH, NICHOLAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAM, KENNETH $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,590.00, $12,500 PLUS COSTS. DEFENDANT FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5(G) REGARDING THE TIMING OF RETURN OR PROVISION AT THE ESTIMATE. DEFENDANT ALSO FAILED TO DEMONSTRATE THE REASONABLENESS AND AMOUNT OF CLAIMED REPAIRS/LOST. CIVIL CODE 1950.5(E). THESE TWO FAILURES SUPPORT FINDING BAD FAITH UNDER 1950.5(E). DEPOSIT WAS $4,550. STATUTORY DAMAGES ARE $9,100. THE PARTIAL REFUND WAS $833.90. AWARD IS $3,716.10 (4,550 - 833.90) PLUS $9,100. PLAINTIFF WAIVED RECOVERY OVER JURISDICTIONAL LIMIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GREGORICH, NICHOLAS TAM, KENNETH
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY APPELLANT TAM, KENNETH

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Nicholas Gregorich appeared.
Defendant Kenneth Tam appeared, represented by Jethro S. Busch.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Plaintiff Nicholas Gregorich sworn and testified.
Defendant Kenneth Tam sworn and testified.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Plaintiff Exhibit #1 - 2 Page Documents of Contractors Fees
Plaintiff Exhibit #2 - 3 Page Documents with Move Out Photos Taken by the Landlord
Defense Exhibit A - 1 Page Document of Email Dated 9/2/2025 from Mr. Tam to Plaintiff
Defense Exhibit B - 1 Page Document of Email Dated 6/3/2025 sent by Plaintiff to Mr. Tam
Defense Exhibit C - 1 Page Document - 10th Paragraph Titled Maintenance Repair and Alterations
Plaintiff Exhibit #3 - 1 Page Document of Two Photos, One Dated 8/15 and Second Dated 8/30/2025
Plaintiff Exhibit #4 - 1 Page Document of Email from Mr. Tam to Plaintiff dated 6/30/2025
Plaintiff Exhibit #5 - 1 Page Document of Email Chain Between Kenneth Tam on 9/29/2025
Plaintiff Exhibit #6 - A Number of Photos of The Move in Condition
Plaintiff's/Respondent's exhibits retained.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: A. Torres; Not reported. (606)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Set For Trial On Feb-11-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-11-2026 Continued To Feb-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-10-2025 Judgment Entered
